name: button_not_overlapping_footer
expected: Back to Home button is displayed above the grey background footer.
stdin: User navigates to the page with the Back to Home button.
expected_stdout: Back to Home button is displayed above the grey background footer.

name: button_visibility_on_scroll
expected: Back to Home button remains visible and does not overlap with footer.
expected_stdout: Back to Home button remains visible and does not overlap with footer.

name: responsive_design_check
expected: Back to Home button adjusts its position without overlapping footer.
stdin: User resizes the browser window to various widths.
expected_stdout: Back to Home button adjusts its position without overlapping footer.

name: button_click_functionality
expected: User is redirected to the home page.
stdin: User clicks on the Back to Home button.
expected_stdout: User is redirected to the home page.

name: footer_color_check
expected: Footer color matches the specified design.
expected_stdout: Footer color matches the specified design.

name: button_style_check
expected: Button style matches the Figma design specifications.
stdin: User inspects the Back to Home button style.
expected_stdout: Button style matches the Figma design specifications.

name: edge_case_no_footer
expected: Back to Home button is displayed correctly.
stdin: User navigates to a page without a footer.
expected_stdout: Back to Home button is displayed correctly.

name: edge_case_button_disabled
expected: No action is taken, button remains disabled.
stdin: User attempts to click a disabled Back to Home button.
expected_stdout: No action is taken, button remains disabled.
